div.p: Represents an optional value — a computation that either produces a result or fails silently.

ul.li: Just a → unwrap a, apply f, return the result
Nothing → skip f, propagate Nothing immediately

g.title: Unwrap a from Just a, apply f. Result is whatever f returns — Just b or Nothing.
f is never called. Nothing propagates unchanged through the entire chain.
f is not called — Nothing is already present.
